MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Justin Hedemark for John Wooster.

Mr. Hedemark stated that he received a receipt from the first financial institution yesterday, that he received a fax from the second institution today and that he will file it. Status on filing of receipts for the blocked accounts is continued to December 13, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
